scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . || bun -e "console.warn('[ai-api] Skipping ruff check: ruff unavailable on this host.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format . || bun -e "console.warn('[ai-api] Skipping ruff fix: ruff unavailable on this host.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.format: uv run ruff format . || bun -e "console.warn('[ai-api] Skipping ruff format: ruff unavailable on this host.'); process.exit(0)"
